title: cynoglottis chetikiana subsp. chetikiana
intro: Cynoglottis chetikiana subsp. chetikiana, a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, is native to the Balkan Peninsula and is also known as Balkan orchid or Balkan cynoglottis. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Cynoglottis chetikiana subsp. chetikiana include potential uses in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its antioxidant properties, which may help protect against cell damage. The plant is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and its herbal preparations have been used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
